channel.title: It Career Playbook on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in It Career Playbook on simeononsecurity

item.title: Building and Managing an IT Team: Structure, Hiring, and Onboarding
item.category: "building an it team" , "it team management" , "it hiring guide" , "it onboarding" , "it team structure" , "managing it staff" , "it manager tips" , "managing an it team" , "it career playbook"
item.description: Learn how to build and manage a high-performing IT team, from defining team structure and writing job descriptions to running effective onboarding and retaining talent.

item.title: Earning Certifications and Advancing in IT: A Promotion Strategy Guide
item.category: "it career advancement" , "it certifications for promotion" , "how to get promoted in it" , "it career growth" , "senior it roles" , "it career strategy" , "moving up in it" , "it career playbook"
item.description: Learn how to use certifications, performance reviews, and strategic career moves to advance your IT career and earn promotions faster.

item.title: IT Policies and Change Management: ITSM, ITIL, and CAB Explained
item.category: "it change management" , "ITIL change management" , "CAB change advisory board" , "ITSM practices" , "it policies for teams" , "change management process it" , "managing an it team" , "it career playbook"
item.description: Learn how to build IT policies and run effective change management processes using ITSM, ITIL 4, and Change Advisory Board (CAB) practices that reduce risk and downtime.

item.title: IT Regulations and Compliance: ITIL, NIST, SOC 2, HIPAA, and More
item.category: "it compliance frameworks" , "NIST SP 800-53" , "SOC 2 compliance" , "HIPAA it requirements" , "FedRAMP" , "PCI DSS" , "ITIL 4" , "it regulations guide" , "moving up in it" , "it career playbook"
item.description: Understand the key IT regulations and compliance frameworks that senior IT professionals must know, including ITIL 4, NIST SP 800-53, SOC 2, HIPAA, FedRAMP, and PCI DSS.

item.title: Outsourcing vs. In-House IT: What to Keep and What to Hand Off
item.category: "outsourcing vs in-house it" , "managed service provider" , "MSP vs internal it" , "co-managed it" , "what to outsource in it" , "it manager decisions" , "it team strategy" , "managing an it team" , "it career playbook"
item.description: Learn how IT managers decide what to outsource versus keep in-house, including managed services, co-managed IT, cloud vendors, and when in-house teams create more value.

item.title: Technical vs. Management Track in IT: Choosing Your Career Path
item.category: "technical vs management track it" , "it management career path" , "individual contributor vs manager" , "it career path decision" , "staff engineer vs it manager" , "principal engineer" , "moving up in it" , "it career playbook"
item.description: Compare the individual contributor (IC) technical ladder against the management track in IT and learn how to choose the right career path for your goals.

item.title: Courses and Career Playbooks for CompTIA, Cisco, EC-Council, ISC2 Exams, and Cybersecurity Careers - SimeonOnSecurity
item.category: "CompTIA courses" , "Cisco courses" , "EC-Council courses" , "ISC2 exams" , "Cybersecurity careers" , "Certification preparation" , "Networking fundamentals" , "Network security" , "Ethical hacking" , "Information security management"
item.description: Explore our comprehensive courses and career playbooks for CompTIA, Cisco, EC-Council, ISC2 exams, and cybersecurity careers. Prepare for industry-leading certifications and gain valuable insights for a successful career in cybersecurity.
